props.text: Kept me dry on my rainy commute — perfect waterproof jacket.
Ran a size small and the sleeves felt tight.
Not warm enough for Baguio — expected more insulation.
Super light and breathable for hot weather in Bangkok.
Cozy fleece for cool evenings, soft hand-feel.
Sizing was inconsistent — exchange hassle.
Gore-Tex shell handled monsoon trails without leaking.
Great urban commute bag, stayed dry in the rain.
Disappointed — claimed waterproof but soaked through.
Breathable tee that survives Singapore humidity.
Warm beanie, perfect gift for highland trips.
Decent casual overshirt, nothing special.
Too heavy for hot weather commuting.
Packable shell stuffed into my bag — light and ready.
Office blazer looks formal without overheating.
